author: anon-a7c6025f
content:
Analysis: ferray-ufunc's exp_f32/log_f32 call dispatch_unary_f32 with f32::exp/f32::ln as the scalar function. Even with pulp SIMD dispatch, the transcendental itself is scalar libm — LLVM cannot auto-vectorize complex libm functions.

Plan: Write polynomial approximation kernels for exp/log directly in ferrotorch-core that ARE auto-vectorizable. The exp polynomial (range-reduction + Horner evaluation + 2^n scaling) uses only add/mul/round/bitops — all of which LLVM vectorizes. Replace ferray-ufunc calls in fast_exp/fast_log with these.

Expected speedup: ~4-8x on AVX2 (4-8 elements per SIMD lane instead of 1).
